title: Illuvia Prime Project
description:
A modified version of the Technical Electrical: Secret Schemes Modpack by waddon1.
Modified to have some additional features like PlasmoVoice for the Illuvia Prime Minecraft server.
body:
# Illuvia Prime

Welcome to Illuvia Prime, a unique Modpack designed for Minecraft 1.21.1 using NeoForge 21.1.77. It combines magic and technology into a cohesive and exciting experience, offering something for both adventurers and engineers alike.

A modified version of the Technical Electrical: Secret Schemes Modpack by waddon1.

## What does it add?

- Magic and Technology: Explore powerful magical mods and advanced technological systems.
- A New Dimension: Discover the Undergarden, a mysterious and eerie world filled with unique challenges.
- Voice Chat Integration: Thanks to PlasmoVoice, players can communicate directly on compatible servers via proximity or group chats without external tools like Discord.

## Why download Illuvia Prime?

- Dive into a world of magic and machines where creativity and strategy intertwine.
- Participate in the evolving Illuvia Prime server lore, where the story grows with the community.
- Compatible with other Technical Electrical: Secret Schemes servers or standalone use.

## Important Notes

- Designed for the Illuvia Prime Minecraft server, but also great for single-player or other servers.
- The Illuvia Prime community is German-speaking, but the admins are fluent in English and welcome all players.

## Other Information

- Over 100 Mods carefully curated to balance technology and magic.
- Regular updates to align with the Illuvia Prime server compatibility.
- Easy to install and start—no additional setup required.
- Explore, build, and thrive in the world of Illuvia Prime!


<details>
<summary>Featured Mods</summary>

  - Ars Nouveau
  - Applied Energistics
  - Genetics Resequenced
  - Modern Industrialization
  - Mekanism
  - PneumaticCraft Repressurized
  - Immersive Engineering
  - Security Craft
  - Stellaris
  - Computer Craft
  - Occultism
  - Totemic

  And much more! Other included mods can be seen in the file dependencies
</details>
